investors.name: Microtraction
investors.description: Early-stage venture capital firm founded in 2017 to bridge the funding gap for African technology entrepreneurs. Invests $100,000 for 7% equity at the pre‑seed stage, sector‑agnostic with a focus on high‑growth tech businesses. Has invested in over 60 African startups across 8 countries, with a strong concentration in Nigeria and Ghana. Portfolio spans fintech, health tech, media & entertainment, e-commerce, AI & analytics, and crypto & web3 sectors.
